since_last: 13% of 84 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +0.24%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 13% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.45% · BTC -2.29% · Gold -1.48% · Nasdaq100 -1.77%. 13% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +0.24%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +0.24%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -2.17%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +9.44%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +9.44%, BIDU +5.27%, AVAV +5.22%, AVGO +2.32%, CHKP +1.31%. Laggards: NOW -3.82%, MGNI -3.75%, PUBM -3.39%, RXRX -3.10%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.88% at $150.79
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.88% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
